personality_one_liner: A high-energy, digital playground for Gen-Z creators using expressive dark mode and tactile feedback to make AI content creation feel like unlocking a high score.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room to allow dark mode surfaces to separate through tone rather than borders. Chunky, tactile spacing for controls.

do's: Floating action buttons and 'Create Content' sticky CTA container

screens.name: Onboarding
screens.purpose: Gamified entry flow allowing users to pick their niche and goals.
screens.layout: Vertical stack. Huge display header 'CHOOSE YOUR NICHE'. Grid of oversized selectable pills (surfaceTertiary) that flip to brandTertiary when active. Big sticky 'LOCK IN' bottom CTA.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: The pulse of the app, tracking streaks and showing recent AI posts.

states.loading: Skeleton cards mimicking the horizontal feeds.
states.empty: Stylized 3D shape illustration + 'No chains yet. Start your first streak.' + 'CREATE NOW' CTA.

screens.layout: Top header with large 'YOUR STREAK IS ALIVE' typography. Large progress ring/card for streak counting. Horizontal scroll of dark-themed cards for 'Recent Generated Content'. Pinned floating pill at bottom center 'CREATE CONTENT' wrapped in a glass container.

screens.name: Content Generation Wizard
screens.purpose: A fluid, single-column configuration form for generating hooks, scripts, and hashtags.

states.loading: Full screen neon pulse animation indicating AI is 'thinking'.

screens.layout: Clean vertical scroll. Segmented controls (pill shaped) for duration (15s/30s/60s) and language. Large chunky toggle buttons. Sticky bottom CTA 'GENERATE MAGIC' above the home indicator.

screens.name: AI Output Viewer
screens.purpose: Presents the generated script, hashtags, voiceover, and viral score in clear, actionable chunks.
screens.layout: Stacked floating glass cards over a dark texture background. One card for the Script (mono-spaced styled body). One card for 'Voiceover' with a tactile Play icon. One card for Viral Score (neon glowing metric). 'Schedule Post' sticky CTA.

screens.name: Scheduler
screens.purpose: Visual calendar to see upcoming and scheduled posts.

states.empty: Calendar displays zero dots. 'No posts scheduled this month.'

screens.layout: Calendar grid at the top with brandPrimary (Lime) dot indicators. Vertical list of scheduled posts below it in card format with dark image previews. 'Quick Schedule' floating FAB.

streak_bg.alt: Abstract neon glowing shapes on dark background

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette: Deep Obsidian/Charcoal with Acid Lime (#CCFF00) accents. All purples, indigos, and blues are BANNED per prompt instructions.
Implement 'Material You / Expressive DARK' style. Maintain high contrast readability.
The primary CTA ('Create Content', 'Lock In', 'Generate Magic') must be sticky above the home indicator, housed in a glass or solid container so scrolling content disappears cleanly behind it.
Use Phosphor icons consistently. Ensure icons on dark surface are clearly legible.
For the Streak / Dashboard cards, use the streak_bg image combined with a top-to-bottom vertical linear gradient scrim (transparent to surfaceInverse ~70%) to ensure foreground metrics readability.
Ensure 'Figtree' is used for all body/tech readouts and 'Outfit' is exclusively for large, expressive display headers.
Embed haptic feedback on all primary interactions: tabs, niche selections, and a heavy success haptic when generating AI content.
Include a horizontal scroll view for 'Recent Generated Content' cards, utilizing proper edge margins so cards aren't flush to the screen edge.
Do not implement generic Material Material indigo styling; rely purely on the generated Lime+Graphite palette.
